title: Desk Time Activity Tracker
problem: Students and professionals lacked clear visibility into desktop usage patterns and productivity trends.
solution: Created a desktop-linked tracker with event logging, summaries, and activity insights backed by a PHP + MySQL API.
impact: Improved self-monitoring and productivity planning through actionable analytics.

title: GST Billing System
problem: Small businesses needed a simple billing flow with GST support.
solution: Built a GST billing system with invoice generation and tax-compliant totals.
impact: Improved billing speed and GST compliance for daily operations.

title: Health Tracker App
problem: Users needed a simple mobile workflow to track health activities with local reliability.
solution: Developed an Android health tracker using SQLite storage and multimedia-supported health logs.
impact: Provided reliable local tracking and better personal health consistency.

title: AI Resume Builder
problem: Job seekers struggle to craft ATS-ready resumes quickly.
solution: Built an AI-assisted resume builder with structured sections and export-ready layouts.
impact: Accelerates resume creation with consistent formatting for ATS scans.

title: Portfolio Website
problem: Needed a premium portfolio to showcase projects, skills, and contact details in one place.
solution: Built a recruiter-ready portfolio with dynamic sections, animations, and a live contact backend.
impact: Creates a single high-converting place for recruiters to evaluate work and reach out.
